message:
Improve watcher package test coverage (61.7% → 84.7%)

watcher_test.go additions:
- EventType String() method coverage
- New() wrapper function
- Errors() channel accessor
- Close() nil and idempotent cases
- translateEvent edge cases (nil watcher, empty name, outside path, provider-only)
- Profile delete/rename events
- Ignore patterns (.git, Thumbs.db, desktop.ini)
- eventTypeForPath for deep paths and directory operations
- isDirNoSymlink for symlinks, files, non-existent paths
- shouldIgnoreParts comprehensive coverage
- maybeEmitProviderBootstrapEvents (nil, empty, outside, nested, symlinks)
- addDir already-watched case
- addRecursive symlink and .git skipping

debounce_test.go additions:
- newDebouncer with zero and negative delays (default fallback)
- ShouldEmit with nil debouncer and empty key
- cleanupLocked triggered after 100 calls
- cleanupLocked preserves recent entries
- Multiple keys debouncing behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
